display_name: UCC passkey-auth — audit-log persistence (Redis primary store)

research.note: Research inherited from parent ucc-passkey-auth feature.

prd.note: PRD inherited from parent. Architectural decision (Redis vs new endpoint) captured in §Problem below.

tasks.approval_note: User approved 2026-05-17. Security audit surfaced 1 HIGH finding (operator_label PII in public-access blob) → T4 amended to add cron-write sanitize step (hash operator_label to operator_label_hash before blob put). Redis live store keeps raw emails for AuditLogPanel; blob gets only hashes. No other task changes.

t6_resolved_2026_05_19.root_cause: CRON_SECRET env var was never set in Vercel production after PR #122 (2026-05-17) added the auth check at src/app/api/cron/sync-audit-log/route.ts:39. Vercel's scheduled cron caller sent `Authorization: Bearer undefined` daily → 401 → silent exit → no Redis read → no Blob write. Visible only because Hobby plan log retention (30min) expired the 401 entries before any natural audit could catch them.
fix_applied: 1. Generated cryptographically secure 64-hex-char CRON_SECRET via openssl rand -hex 32
2. Added to Vercel production env via `vercel env add CRON_SECRET production` (stdin from file, no echo)
3. Redeployed latest production deployment dpl_DBt2M3xZCuzSyPpj3QSCnuJ5NCPN via `vercel redeploy` to apply env var (~2min build)
4. Manually invoked cron route with new Bearer auth → response: {ok:true, synced:16, url:<blob>, pii_redacted:true}
5. Verified blob HEAD returns 200 (was 404 for 2 days)
6. Verified blob content: 16 JSONL events, 4364 bytes, first event auth_session_minted from 2026-05-18T12:21:48Z, zero raw operator_label fields (PII sanitization working)

remaining_cascade_issue.symptom: FT2 ucc-audit-log-sync.yml workflow (run 26101838762) failed at git push origin main with GH006 'Protected branch update failed' — the workflow's auto-commit step blocked by branch protection added 2026-05-19 (chore/2026-05-19-batch-a1-d1-c1-c2 commit c9f993f via gh api).
remaining_cascade_issue.what_actually_worked: Workflow successfully fetched blob, diffed, staged 16 new lines, created local commit [main 237da17]. Only the final push was rejected.
fixes_options: Option A: add github-actions[bot] to branch protection bypass via `gh api -X PUT repos/Regevba/FitTracker2/branches/main/protection` with bypass_pull_request_allowances.apps: ['github-actions']. Calibration-safe (GH API only, no FT2 commit). 5 min.
Option B: modify .github/workflows/ucc-audit-log-sync.yml to open a PR instead of direct push (uses peter-evans/create-pull-request action). Infra-glob touch → defer to 2026-05-22+. 30 min.
remaining_cascade_issue.immediate_impact_assessment: For B8 UCC kill-criteria checkpoint 2026-05-23: blob is publicly readable (operators can curl it directly to evaluate K1/K2/K3); FT2 mirror is NOT required for B8. T6 unblock complete for downstream consumers; FT2 mirror is observability convenience that can wait.

resolution_2026_05_20.shipped_via: FT2 PR #411 (merged 2026-05-20) — UCC audit-log workflow PR-pattern fix
resolution_2026_05_20.outcome: Workflow now opens a PR via peter-evans/create-pull-request instead of direct push to main. Eliminates the GH006 protected-branch failure class. Closure: t6 cascade fully resolved.
resolution_2026_05_20.verification_pending: Next daily cron run (~2026-05-23 06:00 UTC) should successfully open a PR with the fresh blob diff. Daily-integrity-checkpoint will surface success in next snapshot.

t6_blocker_2026_05_19.symptom: Vercel Blob URL https://wbm976bbad3tvk2o.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ucc-auth-events.jsonl returns HTTP 404 after 2 full daily cron windows (2026-05-18 + 2026-05-19).
t6_blocker_2026_05_19.cascade: FT2 ucc-audit-log-sync.yml workflow fails daily since 2026-05-18T08:53Z with `curl: (22) The requested URL returned error: 404`. The workflow itself is correctly configured (UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL set per T7); the upstream Vercel Cron at fitme-story is not populating the blob.
likely_causes: Operator sign-in to seed Redis (per original resume plan) did not write events, OR
fitme-story Vercel Cron /api/cron/sync-audit-log is failing silently (Redis read error / blob write error / env var missing on Vercel)
Cron is firing but Redis is empty → writes empty array → blob put fails or is rejected
debug_path: 1. Verify CRON_SECRET is set in fitme-story Vercel production env
2. Manually invoke: curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET' https://fitme-story.vercel.app/api/cron/sync-audit-log — inspect response.synced count + response.url
3. If synced=0: Redis is empty → operator must sign in at /control-room/sign-in to seed events
4. If response 5xx or error: read Vercel runtime logs for the cron route via Vercel MCP
5. Once blob exists (HEAD returns 200): re-trigger FT2 workflow_dispatch on ucc-audit-log-sync.yml
t6_blocker_2026_05_19.calibration_window_safety: All debug steps above are HTTP calls + Vercel env-var checks — no infra-glob commits. Safe during 2026-05-15 → 2026-05-21 calibration window.

confirmed_state: Cron route is correctly deployed: HEAD /api/cron/sync-audit-log returns 401 (route exists, auth-protected)
Cron is registered in vercel.json: /api/cron/sync-audit-log at schedule '13 5 * * *'
Latest production deployment dpl_DBt2M3xZCuzSyPpj3QSCnuJ5NCPN (2026-05-19) is READY
ZERO cron fire log entries in last 24h (and 7d); only logs are 1 HEAD probe (my own) + 1 random page view
t6_diagnosis_2026_05_19_via_vercel_mcp.root_cause: Vercel Cron is not triggering the route at 05:13 UTC. Function deployment is healthy; cron registration is valid; but scheduled invocations are not occurring.
likely_causes_ranked: 1. Vercel Hobby plan cron not auto-activated — some Hobby crons require explicit enable in dashboard /cron-jobs UI
2. Vercel-side cron infrastructure stall (silent fire-failure that doesn't surface in runtime logs)
3. Cron deployment desync — vercel.json changed but Vercel-side cron registration didn't update
recommended_operator_action: 2. Check 'Last invoked' timestamp for /api/cron/sync-audit-log — if 'Never' or older than 2026-05-15, cron is stalled
3. If there's an 'Enable' or 'Resume' button → click it. If not, redeploy fitme-story (push no-op commit to main) to refresh cron registration
4. After redeploy: wait for next 05:13 UTC fire (≤24h) OR have operator sign in at /control-room/sign-in to seed Redis
post_fix_validation: curl -I https://wbm976bbad3tvk2o.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ucc-auth-events.jsonl — expect 200 after first successful cron fire
gh run list --repo Regevba/FitTracker2 --workflow ucc-audit-log-sync.yml --limit 1 — expect conclusion=success
cat .claude/logs/ucc-auth-events.jsonl in FT2 main after next FT2 GHA fire — expect ≥3 events
t6_diagnosis_2026_05_19_via_vercel_mcp.alternative_quick_fix_path: Skip cron entirely: change the Vercel route to be invoked directly by the FT2 GHA workflow with CRON_SECRET. FT2 GHA already runs daily; making it the PRIMARY trigger removes Vercel-Cron dependency. Would require: (a) GH secret CRON_SECRET set on FT2 repo, (b) FT2 workflow modified to POST to /api/cron/sync-audit-log with Bearer auth before fetching the blob. ~30 min, infra-glob touch — defer to 2026-05-22+.

t6_resume_plan_2026_05_18_SUPERSEDED.trigger: Natural Vercel cron fires daily at 05:13 UTC; GHA ucc-audit-log-sync.yml fires at 05:17 UTC (now wired with UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL per T7 close 2026-05-17T14:05:50Z; workflow self-activates when the blob exists).

resume_check_sequence: curl the URL — expect 3+ sanitized JSONL events (operator_label_hash present, operator_label absent)
T7 wire step already done 2026-05-17T14:05:50Z (PR #387); SKIP `gh variable set` step
gh workflow run ucc-audit-log-sync.yml --repo Regevba/FitTracker2 (force re-run now that blob exists)
T8 parts_deferred reconcile already done in PR #387; SKIP
Append §99 sub-entry to case study: 'T6 closed 2026-05-18, B7 fully validated end-to-end, B8 kill-criteria gate ready'
t6_resume_plan_2026_05_18_SUPERSEDED.why_path_b: Vercel Hobby plan lacks 'Run Now' cron trigger (Pro-only). Vercel UI /crons URL 404'd (correct path is /cron-jobs but operator confirmed no Run button visible). Curl-with-CRON_SECRET path declined to keep secret out of conversation transcript. Path B = natural cron + 17h wait, well within B8 deadline (2026-05-23) 5-day buffer.

problem_statement: logAuthEvent at src/lib/auth/audit-log.ts:113-143 does not persist anything in Vercel production. Stage 1 writes cwd/.local/ucc-auth-events.jsonl which is read-only on Vercel function filesystem. Stage 2 fetches UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_ENDPOINT which was never provisioned. The cron /api/cron/sync-audit-log reads the same dead path and returns synced:0 every run. Discovered 2026-05-17 during B7 (wire UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL) execution: HEAD probe to wbm976bbad3tvk2o.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ucc-auth-events.jsonl returned 404, confirming the blob was never written. All audit events since 2026-05-07 shipped silently into the void.
proposed_solution: Replace local-file Stage 1 with Upstash Redis as primary store. Each logAuthEvent call does redis.lpush('ucc:audit-log:events', JSON.stringify(event)) + bounded redis.ltrim to last 10000 events. readAuthEvents reads via lrange. Cron route refactors to read Redis range and write Blob (Redis stays the live source, Blob is the daily FT2-sync target). Uses existing Upstash provisioning (KV_REST_API_*) — no new env vars or infrastructure required.
blocks_followups: B7 — wire UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL repo variable (calendar-anchored 2026-05-17, blocked until cron writes blob)
B8 — UCC T+7d kill-criteria checkpoint 2026-05-23 (K1/K2/K3 require audit-log data)
C5 — Part 10 framework-health passkey panel render verification (depends on B7)

tasks.title: Add Redis audit-log primitives in src/lib/auth/redis-audit-log.ts (pushEvent, readEvents, trimEvents)
tasks.note: redis.lpush('ucc:audit-log:events', json) for write, redis.ltrim('ucc:audit-log:events', 0, 9999) for bound, redis.lrange('ucc:audit-log:events', 0, N) for read. Uses existing getRedis() from redis-client.ts. Cap = 10000 events (~5MB at avg 500B/event).
tasks.related_prs_note: fitme-story #122 = T1-T5 ship; FT2 #163 + #248 = parent UCC case study cross-references where redis-fix work is documented

tasks.title: Refactor logAuthEvent to write via Redis primary, drop local-fs Stage 1, keep best-effort blob-endpoint Stage 2
tasks.note: Drop the fs.appendFile path entirely (it silently fails on Vercel). Stage 1 becomes redis.lpush. Stage 2 (UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_ENDPOINT) stays as optional escape hatch for external log forwarders.

tasks.title: Refactor readAuthEvents to read from Redis range
tasks.expanded_scope_note: T3 originally scoped to readAuthEvents only. During integration trace surfaced load-events.ts::loadAuthEvents as the actually-used UI reader (AuditLogPanel + audit page). Refactored both — single-PR scope.
tasks.note: AuditLogPanel consumes this. Default range = last 50 events (panel's UI limit).

tasks.title: Refactor /api/cron/sync-audit-log to read Redis, sanitize PII (hash operator_label), write Blob
tasks.note: Read all events via lrange 0..-1. SANITIZE each event: drop operator_label, add operator_label_hash via sha256Truncated(operator_label, 12) — same convention as credential_id_hash. Write sanitized JSONL to Blob with addRandomSuffix:false + access:public + allowOverwrite:true (deterministic URL, PII-free contents). Do NOT trim Redis. Security amendment per 2026-05-17 pre-implementation audit: blob is publicly readable so operator emails must never leave Redis.

tasks.title: Update unit tests (audit-log.test.ts + load-events.test.ts) for Redis-backed flow with mock Redis
tasks.note: Cover: write→read round-trip, ltrim enforcement at cap, redactInput still applied, server-side safety (no fs leak).

tasks.title: Deploy + manually invoke cron via curl to validate blob lands at deterministic URL
tasks.note: After PR merges to fitme-story main + Vercel auto-deploy READY: curl GET https://fitme-story.vercel.app/api/cron/sync-audit-log -H 'Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET'. Expect response {ok:true, synced:N>=2, url:'https://...'}. HEAD the URL — expect 200.
tasks.outcome: Resolved 2026-05-19 + cascade fixed 2026-05-20. Original blocker: Vercel Blob 404 because CRON_SECRET env var was empty in production (workflow auth received "Bearer undefined"). Fixed via: (1) generated new 64-hex-char secret + vercel env add + redeploy; (2) PR #411 (2026-05-20) refactored ucc-audit-log-sync.yml to open a PR via peter-evans/create-pull-request instead of direct push to main (eliminates GH006 protected-branch-update-failed class). Verification: blob HEAD returns 200; 24+ events in ucc-auth-events.jsonl Blob (16 originally, growing). Full root-cause analysis in phases.implementation.t6_resolved_2026_05_19 block. Status flipped pending → complete 2026-05-24 to close drift.

tasks.title: Wire UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL repo variable in FT2 via gh CLI (B7 unblock)
tasks.completed_note: Wired preemptively ahead of T6 because the blob URL is deterministic from the Vercel Blob store ID (store_Wbm976bbAd3TvK2o → https://wbm976bbad3tvk2o.public.blob.vercel-storage.com/ucc-auth-events.jsonl). The FT2 ucc-audit-log-sync.yml workflow short-circuits cleanly on 404, so setting the variable now is safe; it auto-activates the moment the next Vercel Cron (05:13 UTC) populates the blob. The workflow_dispatch verification still waits on T6 (cron must produce a real blob first).
tasks.note: gh variable set UCC_AUDIT_BLOB_URL --body '<url-from-T6>' --repo Regevba/FitTracker2. Trigger ucc-audit-log-sync.yml via workflow_dispatch to verify FT2 syncs the blob to .claude/logs/ucc-auth-events.jsonl.

All implementation work shipped via fitme-story PR #122 (T1-T5, 2026-05-17) + fitme-story PRs #410+#411+#412 (T6 resolution, 2026-05-19) + parent FT2 PRs documented in §99 of parent case study.
